intent.summary: Enhance AAAA-Nexus hosted MCP on atomadic.tech and tighten monetization (x402 + API key + OAuth discovery per MCP 2025-11-25).
deliverables: Worker /mcp + well-known OAuth metadata parity with MCP HTTP auth spec
x402 V2 header audit vs docs.x402.org and nexus-pay crate
Billable MCP tool SKUs with manifest parity in !ass-ade/mcp/server.json
Optional: Aegis mcp-proxy execute pricing consistency (utils.rs fee table)

testsAndCommands: (storefront) cargo test -p nexus-pay  # when changing x402 crate

hops.findingSummary: HTTP-based MCP should conform to OAuth 2.1 subset and protected resource metadata for discovery.

verificationEvidence.note: Primary spec URL; implement against fetched text in Worker.

hops.findingSummary: Benchmarks stress tool selection under many distractor tools — narrows SKUs + clear pricing beats raw tool sprawl.

verificationEvidence.note: Hop 1b — external modality; product policy only until harnessed in CI.

hops.findingSummary: Official docs define Base64 JSON in PAYMENT-* headers; audit nexus-pay comments vs doc.
CF documents remote MCP server deployment on edge — align ops runbook with Worker wrangler.toml.

verificationEvidence.note: Ops/hosting evidence; not a revenue proof.

deliverableScopes: Hosted MCP JSON-RPC + OAuth discovery on Cloudflare Worker
x402 settlement path shared with API-key gated routes
ASS-ADE stdio manifest alignment for developer discovery

risksAndGaps: Revenue 'ASAP' requires live traffic + pricing experiments — not provable from repo alone [H].
OAuth without IdP secrets in CI will block full auth E2E until wrangler secrets configured [S].
MCP tool sprawl increases retrieval failure per MCPAgentBench — gate new tools with metering + tests.
